context_text: <A> and ah i i'm married of you know for quite a while and off my wife said don't get discouraged so i i we when i was there i asked ah ah a manager i said wh how what do i do and he says tom just keep keep on doing it every other day and after two two weeks you know start exercising few few minutes more and more and more / <B> uh-huh / <A> and i'm a you know stubborn ol stubborn old man i never give up the ship / <B> yeah / <A> yeah would you believe after one year i was doing one hour of ah treadmill / <B> wow / <A> one hour of bicycling one hour of miscellaneous exercise what i'm talking about is ah crunching and so forth you know / <B> wow / <A> half an hour of water exercise my size was forty six waist now i'm thirty eight / <B> wow / <A> i lost thirty five pound my my diabetes is more than normal / <B> wow
